description: Distractor-padded QuALITY multiple-choice QA evaluation comparing EVQ-Cosh vs Geometric RoPE on 454M models. Tests long-range retrieval ability by embedding target articles among distractor text at controlled context lengths.

8k.note: Largest gap; EVQ maintains random-level, Geo drops further

16k.note: Both below random; 454M capacity limit reached

32k.note: Geo completely collapsed; EVQ retains trace signal

key_findings: EVQ-Cosh outperforms Geometric RoPE at ALL context lengths on QA retrieval
Maximum advantage at 2x extrapolation (8K): EVQ 25.0% vs Geo 18.0% (+7.0%)
EVQ maintains random-baseline accuracy (25%) at 2x extrapolation; Geo drops to 18%
At 4x+ extrapolation, both models degrade significantly — 454M model capacity limit
EVQ retains non-zero signal (3.5%) at 8x extrapolation where Geo hits 0.0%
Finetune accuracy nearly identical (Geo 78%, EVQ 79%) — difference emerges only with distractor padding
Result consistent with theory: EVQ allocates frequencies to preserve long-range retrieval
